truth_shape.rule: stable truth is reconstructed from events rather than edited as an opaque singleton object

causality_rules: grant.issued must reference a grant.request or explicit policy decision source
action.dispatched must reference an active grant and target node
receipt.recorded must reference action_id and executor_id
memory.compiled must reference verified evidence rather than raw conversation history
idempotency_rules: all commands and events must have stable ids for deduplication and tracing
consumers must deduplicate by event_id and must not assume exactly-once delivery
duplicate action dispatch must converge through idempotency_key or grant and lease constraints
a single state transition must not be double-counted as two separate success facts
machine_checkable_invariants: no action.dispatched without an active grant
no success or failure verification.recorded without receipt.recorded
no trusted or verified memory compilation without verified evidence
non_goals: no synchronous versus asynchronous implementation commitment
no tracing, metrics, and audit backend commitment
no replay or archive storage format commitment
